0.title: Magazine2
0.alt: Analog Club's second magazine, Faces and Places
0.descParagraph:
Our experiences are embedded in both our bodies and the natural world. A glimpse of the sea brings back the unforgettable stickiness of the salt on your skin, and the time-worn wrinkles in the corners of your grandmother’s eyes evoke a lifetime’s worth of laughter and love. These are the spaces where memories find a home. 
Yours truly, UW Analog Club
